DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Any in excess of those may be inoperative provided left VHF radio operates normally.

OperationNote.Para: The VHF communication system is required equipment for FANS operations and must be operative at dispatch using a FANS flight planned route. Neither Right, Left or Center may be inoperative.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided HF or SATCOM data link is operative.

OperationProcedure.Para: If SATCOM datalink is operative: Within VHF coverage: - The following ATC datalink communications are not available: • CPDLC for operations that use FANS B aircraft capability • CPDLC for operations that use FANS A aircraft capability via VHF datalink unless SATCOM datalink is permitted as an alternate subnetwork. - The following ATC datalink Required Communication Performance capabilities are lost:

• Initial Continental Performance for operations that use FANS B CPDLC • RCP 240 for operations that use FANS A CPDLC, unless SATCOM datalink is permitted as an alternate subnetwork. If SATCOM datalink is inoperative: - The following ATC datalink communications are not available: • ADS-C, CPDLC, DCL, OCL, D-ATIS. - The following ATC datalink Required Communication/Surveillance Performance capabilities are lost: • RCP 240 / Initial Continental Performance for CPDLC

Alternate procedures for ATC communications: • ATC permits the use of voice communication for operations that require FANS B aircraft capability • ATC may permit the use of alternate communication means for operations that require FANS A aircraft capability via VHF datalink.
Check that the datalink capability mentioned on the ATC Flight Plan is in line with the aircraft actual capability

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.
